questions.stem: Under COLREG Rule 38, which of the following exemptions from the current Regulations is granted on a permanent basis?

choices.text: The repositioning of lights as a result of conversion from Imperial to metric units and rounding off measurement figures
The installation of lights with ranges prescribed in Rule 22
The requirements for sound signal appliances prescribed in Annex III

questions.explanation: COLREG Rule 38(c) grants a permanent exemption for the repositioning of lights resulting from conversion from Imperial to metric units and rounding off measurement figures.

questions.stem: According to COLREG Rule 38, which of the following time-limited exemptions applies for nine years after the date of entry into force of the Regulations?

choices.text: The requirements for sound signal appliances prescribed in Annex III
The repositioning of masthead lights on vessels of less than 150 meters in length
The installation of lights with ranges prescribed in Rule 22

questions.explanation: COLREG Rule 38(h) provides that the requirements for sound signal appliances prescribed in Annex III are subject to a nine-year exemption from the date of entry into force.
